{{CargoRelic
|name=Papin Pot
|class_id=20824
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=The pressure cooker, the world's first, was invented by physicist Papin. He discovered that the boiling point of water changes with air pressure – the higher the pressure, the higher the boiling point. Therefore, he designed and created a sealed container to trap steam generated from heating water, creating a high-temperature, high-pressure environment that accelerated cooking efficiency.
|fame=18
|art=13
|fth=15
|civ=12
|tech=32
|ss1=Per Master Chef's Legacy activated, Snail ATK +1<br>Master Chef's Legacy activated: 60/60
|ss2=Per Master Chef's Legacy activated, Snail ATK +2<br>Master Chef's Legacy activated: 60/60
|ss3=Per Master Chef's Legacy activated, Snail ATK +3<br>Master Chef's Legacy activated: 60/60
|ss4=Per Master Chef's Legacy activated, Snail ATK +3<br>Master Chef's Legacy activated: 60/60
|ss7=Per Master Chef's Legacy activated, Snail ATK +3<br>Master Chef's Legacy activated: 60/60<br> (Awakened)
}}
